caption: A screen recording captures a browser window alternating between a website and a digital tool. The initial scene shows the "RANDOM.ORG" "True Random Number Service" with a "Dice Roller" that has produced two dice results. Beside this, a website banner for "JASPYS CASEBREAKS.COM" features a man in a black t-shirt and a red and black baseball cap. As the sequence progresses, the view shifts to a "List Randomizer" on the same website. In the "Part 1: Enter List Items" section, a list of sports teams is entered, including "ARIZONA DIAMONDBACKS," "ATLANTA BRAVES," and "CHICAGO CUBS." A prompt states, "Be patient! It may take a little while to randomize your list..." throughout the process. The footer of the page includes a red "Subscribe" button with the text "Hit the SUBSCRIBE button down below!" alongside a banner reading "WWW.JASYPSCASEBREAKS.COM".
